preservedBehaviors.description: useAssessmentDetail checks for employee_engagement_survey template_key
useAssessmentDetail exports isEngagementSurvey in the return object
useAssessmentDetail returns templateLabel as a useMemo
useAssessmentDetail checks looksLikeEngagementSurveyType based on typeName
setup-engagement page has looksLikeEngagementSurveyType function
setup-engagement page offers convert when shouldOfferConvert is true
API route exports POST handler for convert-to-engagement-survey
API route checks for assessment_admin and company_admin roles
useAssessmentDetail extracts category and uses isEngagementCategory
useAssessmentDetail defines isLiftBusiness, isHiringFactor, isJobFitFactor, isLiftSales
isEngagementSurvey includes isEngagementCategory in its disjunction
API route looksLikeEngagementSurveyType accepts category parameter
setup-engagement page checks category === engagement
useAssessmentDetail defines looksLikeEngagementSurveyName based on nameLower
isEngagementSurvey includes looksLikeEngagementSurveyName as a fallback
templateLabel useMemo includes looksLikeEngagementSurveyName and looksLikeEngagementSurveyType in deps
templateLabel falls back to Employee Engagement Survey when name/type hints match
API route looksLikeEngagementSurveyType accepts assessmentName parameter
API route passes assessmentName to looksLikeEngagementSurveyType call
setup-engagement page uses assessment name as a hint for engagement detection
